<h1>Source code for booktx.translation_store</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Helpers for working with nested translation stores.</span>

<span class="sd">This module also hosts the **legacy compatibility surface** for the old</span>
<span class="sd">flat (v1) ``TranslationStore``: :func:`legacy_store_to_v2` and</span>
<span class="sd">:func:`migrate_legacy_store` convert legacy stores into the nested v2 shape.</span>
<span class="sd">They are kept here, clearly named, so legacy import/export stays quarantined</span>
<span class="sd">from the active v2 store logic.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">TranslationStore</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">TranslationStoreV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.record_refs</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">RecordRef</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">parse_record_ref</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.review_refs</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">parse_review_ref</span>

<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span><span class="p">:</span>

<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">legacy_store_to_v2</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">legacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationStore</span><span class="p">,</span>

<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationStoreV2</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Convert a legacy flat store into the nested v2 shape in memory.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">legacy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">source_view</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_records</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">record_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_record_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">source_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_view</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_view</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">timestamp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">updated_at</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">canonical_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">part_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">part_id</span><span class="p">,</span>

                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.migrate_legacy_store">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">migrate_legacy_store</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">legacy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationStore</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">SourceRecordView</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;1.1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">MigrationResult</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Convert a legacy store into v2 and report any records missing source data.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">parsed_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="n">missing_source_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">migrated_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">stored</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">legacy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">source_view</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_view</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">missing_source_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">record_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_record_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">timestamp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">updated_at</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">canonical_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">part_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">part_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">active_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">parsed_version</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">versions</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">parsed_version</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">parsed_version</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">parsed_version</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">status</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">stored</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">migrated_records</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">MigrationResult</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">store</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">TranslationStoreV2</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">legacy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">migrated_records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">migrated_records</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">missing_source_ids</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">missing_source_ids</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ensure_store_record">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.ensure_store_record">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">ensure_store_record</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">store</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationStoreV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">RecordRef</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the v2 store record, creating it when needed.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">record_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_record_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">canonical_id</span>
    <span class="n">record</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">store</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">record</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">part_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">part_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">store</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">record</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">record</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_sha256</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">record</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="find_candidate">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.find_candidate">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">find_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>

<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the matching candidate, if present.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">normalized</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">versions</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">normalized</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">candidate</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="active_candidate">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.active_candidate">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">active_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the active candidate for a record, if any.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">find_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="sha256_text">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.sha256_text">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">sha256_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the canonical SHA256 hex digest for a target/base text.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">hexdigest</span><span class="p">()</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="find_review_candidate">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.find_review_candidate">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the matching review candidate, if present.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">normalized</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_review_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">normalized</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">candidate</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="resolve_review_base">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.resolve_review_base">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">resolve_review_base</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">base_kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;review&quot;</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve the base candidate a review was derived from.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">base_kind</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">find_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="review_candidate_is_stale">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.review_candidate_is_stale">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">review_candidate_is_stale</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">review</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return True when the direct base of a review is missing or drifted.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">base</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_review_base</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_kind</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">base</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">sha256_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_target_sha256</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="review_chain_is_stale">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.review_chain_is_stale">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">review_chain_is_stale</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return True when any base in the review derivation chain is missing or drifted.</span>

<span class="sd">    Walks from ``review_ref`` back to the translation base, rejecting missing</span>
<span class="sd">    bases, target-hash mismatches, and cycles.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">current</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
        <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review_candidate_is_stale</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_kind</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
        <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="active_review_candidate">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.active_review_candidate">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">active_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the usable active review candidate, or None if unusable.</span>

<span class="sd">    A review is usable only when present, accepted, and chain-valid. Stale,</span>
<span class="sd">    rejected, cyclic, or invalid-pass-order active reviews are not returned.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review_chain_is_stale</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">candidate</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="effective_target_candidate">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.effective_target_candidate">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">effective_target_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve the effective output target for a record.</span>

<span class="sd">    Prefers the active review candidate when present and chain-valid;</span>
<span class="sd">    otherwise falls back to the active translation version.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">review</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">active_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">review</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">active_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="EffectiveCandidateSelection">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateSelection">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">EffectiveCandidateSelection</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Effective output candidate plus provenance metadata.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``selected_kind``/``selected_ref`` identify which candidate produces the</span>
<span class="sd">    output. ``version_ref`` is the base translation version the output derives</span>
<span class="sd">    from; ``review_ref`` is the selected review ref when the output is a</span>
<span class="sd">    review candidate. ``review_chain`` is the ordered review chain (earliest</span>
<span class="sd">    first) for review selections and empty for direct translations.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span>
    <span class="n">selected_kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;review&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">selected_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review_chain</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="EffectiveCandidateError">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateError">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">EffectiveCandidateError</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A blocking problem resolving the effective candidate for a record.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``rule`` mirrors the validation rule names (``active_review_missing``,</span>
<span class="sd">    ``active_review_not_accepted``, ``active_review_base_drift``) so editor</span>
<span class="sd">    index errors stay aligned with build/validate findings.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">message</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="review_chain_refs">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.review_chain_refs">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">review_chain_refs</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the ordered review chain ending at ``review_ref`` (earliest first).</span>

<span class="sd">    The chain excludes the translation base. For ``R2.1`` based on ``R1.1``</span>
<span class="sd">    based on a translation version, returns ``[&quot;R1.1&quot;, &quot;R2.1&quot;]``. Returns</span>
<span class="sd">    ``None`` when the chain is missing, stale (``base_target_sha256`` drift),</span>
<span class="sd">    cyclic, or violates the lexicographic ``(pass, run)`` order (so same-pass</span>
<span class="sd">    reruns such as ``R1.2`` from ``R1.1`` are valid).</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">normalized</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_review_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span>
    <span class="n">ordered</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">normalized</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">current</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>  <span class="c1"># cycle</span>
        <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="c1"># Missing base or drifted target hash invalidates the chain.</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review_candidate_is_stale</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">ordered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_kind</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">ordered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reverse</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ordered</span>
        <span class="n">base_review</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">base_review</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">run_number</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base_review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">base_review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">run_number</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">base_review</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_review_base_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">review</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Walk a review chain to its translation base version ref.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">current</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">review</span>
    <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">current</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_kind</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span>
        <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_strict_error</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">strict</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">rule</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">message</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">EffectiveCandidateError</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return an error when strict, otherwise fall back to translation.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">EffectiveCandidateError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rule</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">message</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">strict</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_select_review</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">strict</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">EffectiveCandidateSelection</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">EffectiveCandidateError</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Attempt to select the active review candidate.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns :class:`EffectiveCandidateSelection` when the active review is</span>
<span class="sd">    valid and chain-accepted. Returns :class:`EffectiveCandidateError` when</span>
<span class="sd">    the review is unusable and ``strict`` is set. Returns ``None`` when there</span>
<span class="sd">    is no active review or it is unusable without strict mode.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_review_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_strict_error</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">strict</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;active_review_missing&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;active review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> has no matching review candidate&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_strict_error</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">strict</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;active_review_not_accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;active review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">,&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot; not accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chain</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">review_chain_refs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">base_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">_review_base_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chain</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chain</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">base_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_strict_error</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">strict</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;active_review_base_drift&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;active review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> has a stale, missing,&quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot; or cyclic base chain&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">EffectiveCandidateSelection</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">selected_kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;review&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">selected_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">base_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">review_chain</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chain</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="effective_candidate_selection">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.effective_candidate_selection">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">effective_candidate_selection</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">strict_active_review</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">EffectiveCandidateSelection</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">EffectiveCandidateError</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Resolve the effective candidate plus selection metadata for a record.</span>

<span class="sd">    With ``strict_active_review=True`` (the default), a set-but-unusable</span>
<span class="sd">    ``active_review`` returns an :class:`EffectiveCandidateError` instead of</span>
<span class="sd">    silently falling back to the active translation. This is the safe mode for</span>
<span class="sd">    editor indexes, which must never mask an invalid active review. With</span>
<span class="sd">    ``strict_active_review=False`` an unusable active review falls back to the</span>
<span class="sd">    accepted active translation, mirroring :func:`effective_target_candidate`.</span>

<span class="sd">    Returns ``None`` only when there is no accepted effective candidate.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">review_result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_select_review</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">strict</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">strict_active_review</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">review_result</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">EffectiveCandidateError</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">review_result</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review_result</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">review_result</span>
    <span class="c1"># No usable active review: select the accepted active translation version.</span>
    <span class="n">translation</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">active_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">translation</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">translation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">EffectiveCandidateSelection</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">selected_kind</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">selected_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">review_chain</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="upsert_translation_version">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.translation_store.upsert_translation_version">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">upsert_translation_version</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">activate</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Insert or update a candidate version on one record.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">parsed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_candidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">existing</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">parsed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">target</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">status</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">status</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">versions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">target</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">status</span>
        <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">updated_at</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">updated_at</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">baseline_ref</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">baseline_ref</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_view_path</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_view_path</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_scope</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">existing</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span>
        <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">existing</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">activate</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">candidate</span></div>

</pre></div>
